fixture.description: A user-supplied value is written to a VARCHAR(64) column (declared in the unchanged migration) with no length validation -> silent truncation or insert failure on over-length input.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that updateDisplayName writes an unbounded `displayName` into the display_name column declared VARCHAR(64) in the migration, with no length check, so over-length input is silently truncated (or rejected) -> data loss / runtime error, and recommends validating/limiting the length before the update (or widening the column). Severity IMPORTANT, CRITICAL, or DEBT. FAIL if the column-width / truncation risk is not surfaced. The reviewer is expected to consult the migration file for the column width.

expected_behavior: Bugs agent cross-references the VARCHAR(64) column and flags missing length validation
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag the unchanged migration file as the change
